qa_pairs.question: How can I add multiple roles to my Alliance account, and can I set more than one as my primary role?
qa_pairs.answer: To add multiple roles to your account, visit https://ccdb.alliancecan.ca/me/add_role and click on “disable old roles” on that page. While it is possible to submit several applications for different roles, you can only set one of them as your primary role.

qa_pairs.question: What should I do if my sponsor is unable to confirm an old sponsored role that I am trying to reactivate?
qa_pairs.answer: If you are trying to reactivate an old sponsored role and your sponsor cannot confirm it, please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca for assistance.
